untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a 'put-call ratio' indicator (open-buy put volume / (open-buy put volume + call volume)), which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This is an options market microstructure metric that requires real-time options volume data not available in standard OHLCV feeds.
translation_notes: Signal logic is clear: short stocks in the top decile of put-call ratios with a 1-day holding period and exit on next-day close. However, the put-call ratio cannot be constructed from the allowed indicators. The exit condition uses a reversal logic (close > prev_close suggests mean reversion exit for a short position). The sample period (1993-2001) and four-factor risk adjustment are backtest parameters, not rule conditions.
